title: Style 'Clean' in orange and 'io' in white in the Cleanio header text

requirements.text: In the Layout component header, update the 'Cleanio' wordmark text so that 'Clean' is rendered in orange and 'io' is rendered in white. Split the text into two separate spans: one for 'Clean' with the orange brand color and one for 'io' with white color.

quotes: make the 'clean' in orange colour and 'io' in white for the Cleanio

acceptanceCriteria: The header displays 'Cleanio' with 'Clean' visually in orange
The 'io' portion of 'Cleanio' is visually white
The bike logo remains displayed beside the Cleanio wordmark
The styling is consistent across all pages

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
The bike logo must remain visible beside the Cleanio name in the header
nonGoals: Changing any other header or navigation styles
Changing the font or size of the Cleanio wordmark
